title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at ICRA

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at ICRA
jsonLd.description:
ICRA is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ICRA:
ICRA is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICRA!
